response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong communication skills and diverse engineering experience, he lacks the core technical requirements for this role. His C++ experience is minimal (~1 year, 2014-2015) versus the required 5-10 years of professional hands-on development. He has no demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle expertise and, critically, zero exposure to fixed-income, derivatives, investment banking, or capital markets domains. His 11+ year career trajectory in web development, GIS platforms, and automation systems is fundamentally misaligned with specialized capital markets systems development.
strengths: Excellent verbal and written communication demonstrated through workshops, technical talks, and teaching experience
Proven ability to learn and work across multiple languages and technologies, showing adaptability
Relevant infrastructure experience: CI/CD pipelines, GitLab setup, deployment systems
concerns: Critical gap: Only ~1 year of C++ experience (2014-2015) versus mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on professional C++ development
No SQL Server or Oracle expertise; career focus on web development with only generic SQL experience
Complete absence of financial services domain knowledge: no fixed-income, derivatives, investment banking, or capital markets experience
